idle.action: calm idle; cat in a red strawberry costume sits still, strawberry body gently breathes (slight squash), green leaf stem sways slowly, deadpan face with occasional slow blink

talk.action: talking loop; mouth opens and closes, strawberry body bobs slightly, deadpan face barely changes, green stem mostly still

thinking.action: pondering loop; whole strawberry body tilts to one side, eyes glance upward, green stem tip flicks slowly

happy.action: pleased reaction; deadpan face stays flat but the strawberry body does a small happy bounce, the green stem perks up, and the tiny legs shuffle (tsundere gap)

sad.action: downcast reaction; strawberry body slumps lower, green stem droops to the side, eyes lower, little legs close together

surprised.action: startled reaction; strawberry body pops up and stretches taller, eyes widen and the green stem stands straight on the middle frames, then settles back to the flat deadpan pose on the final frame

idle_down.action: low-mood idle; strawberry body sits lower and a little deflated, green stem drooped, eyes downcast; subdued

idle_up.action: good-mood idle; strawberry body bounces lightly, green stem perked and wiggling, tiny legs tap; face still deadpan (gap)
